title: cracca dumetorum
side_effects: Cracca dumetorum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and increased heart rate. In severe cases, improper use of this plant can lead to respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. Some individuals may experience digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, after ingesting the plant. Furthermore, excessive use or misuse of cracca dumetorum can also cause anxiety and insomnia due to its stimulant properties.
